# Lou's Heating & Cooling

> Family-owned HVAC company based in Lakewood, CO serving the Denver metro and Front Range since 2014. Honest diagnosis, flat-rate pricing, no upselling, 24/7 emergency service.

## Business Information

- Name: Lou's Heating & Cooling
- Owner: Louis (Lou) Hernandez Jr.
- Founded: 2014 (LLC incorporated 2022)
- Address: 1880 S Pierce St #5, Lakewood, CO 80232
- Phone: (303) 949-8584
- Email: lousheatingcooling@icloud.com
- Hours: 24/7 (emergency service always available)
- License/Insurance: Licensed and insured in Colorado
- Accreditation: BBB A+ Accredited (since July 2024)
- Brand Affiliation: Authorized Carrier Dealer
- Website: https://www.loushvac303.com

## Services

- AC Repair: https://www.loushvac303.com/services/ac-repair/
- AC Replacement & Installation: https://www.loushvac303.com/services/ac-replacement/
- Furnace Repair: https://www.loushvac303.com/services/furnace-repair/
- Furnace Replacement & Installation: https://www.loushvac303.com/services/furnace-replacement/
- HVAC Maintenance & Tune-Ups: https://www.loushvac303.com/services/maintenance/
- Swamp Cooler Service: https://www.loushvac303.com/services/swamp-cooler/
- 24/7 Emergency HVAC Service: https://www.loushvac303.com/services/emergency/

## Service Area

Primary: Lakewood, Denver, Arvada, Wheat Ridge, Westminster, Golden, Littleton, Englewood, Aurora, Thornton, Centennial, Commerce City. Mountain communities: Evergreen, Morrison, Kittredge, Indian Hills, Idledale. Also Cherry Hills Village, Louviers.

## Key Pages

- About / Lou's Story: https://www.loushvac303.com/about/
- Customer Reviews: https://www.loushvac303.com/reviews/
- HVAC FAQ: https://www.loushvac303.com/faq/
- Service Area: https://www.loushvac303.com/service-area/
- Contact / Schedule: https://www.loushvac303.com/contact/

## Differentiators

- Flat-rate pricing — quoted before any work begins
- No upselling — diagnose and recommend the simplest honest fix
- Owner-operated by Lou and his partner Nester (no rotating subcontractors)
- 24/7 emergency response across the Denver metro
- 10-year extended parts warranty on new Carrier equipment
- 5-year workmanship warranty on installations
- Free in-home estimates on installations
- Military discount available
- Financing available (subject to qualification)
- Christian, family-driven business values
- Top 3 HVAC Contractors — Lakewood Business Rate 2025
- 5-star rated across HomeAdvisor, Yelp, Angi, BBB

## Specialties

- Denver-altitude HVAC sizing (proper Manual J load calculations accounting for 5,280 ft elevation)
- Swamp cooler / evaporative cooling expertise (Denver's semi-arid climate specialty)
- Carrier equipment authorized installations
- Emergency same-day repairs
- Older home retrofits (especially 1950s-1980s housing common in Lakewood and Wheat Ridge)
